title: Project: The Darkened Manor
description: A complete brand identity for a luxury fragrance brand.
fullContent:
Client: Darkened Manor Fragrances

Brief: Create a brand identity that captures the essence of Victorian gothic romance.

Approach: Developed a visual language combining dark academia with delicate femininity. Created a color palette of charcoal, black, and blush with gold accents. Designed packaging, website, and social media presence.

Result: The brand launched with a 200% increase in pre-orders and was featured in Vogue.

title: Project: The Last Light Film
description: Creative direction and production for a sci-fi short film.
fullContent:
Client: Independent Production Company

Brief: Direct a short film that explores themes of memory, isolation, and hope.

Approach: Developed the visual aesthetic, directed cinematography, and oversaw post-production. The film was shot entirely in natural light to create a haunting atmosphere.

Result: The film won Best Short at the Melbourne International Film Festival.

title: Project: Social Media Strategy - The Canvas Project
description: A 360-degree social media campaign for an arts organization.
fullContent:
Client: The Canvas Project, a non-profit arts organization

Brief: Increase engagement and donations through a social-first campaign.

Approach: Developed a 6-month content strategy including video series, interactive Instagram stories, and community engagement initiatives. Created a visual identity that unified all platforms.

Result: 150% increase in engagement, 40% increase in donations.
